title: Showing Up For Future Me
body: Today had a few small but memorable moments. The morning started with a really good drive into work, cruising most of the way next to a girl in a white STi that sounded great. It reminded me how much I still want to upgrade to an STi someday. The EJ sound just has such a distinct character, and it made the commute feel more enjoyable than usual. Music-wise, I was really into "No Love" by Darknet and Enkojin. It had the right kind of hazy, heavy mood and stuck with me for a while. I also started thinking more seriously about a personal challenge for next month: picking one part of myself that needs improvement and spending the next few months working on it. First focus is being more outgoing, which means going to more raves, concerts, and events solo, even when it feels uncomfortable. I want to build experiences that future me will be glad I actually showed up for. The gym was a highlight too. I had a pretty solid session, set a lot of personal records, and felt noticeably stronger. It feels like eating more food is starting to pay off, and the extra calories are actually turning into better performance. Later, I tried to make time to play games with Lyn-z. Spending time with her still feels valuable and cozy, but the server she plays on just is not for me. I tried to give it another shot, but could not really get into it. One of those situations where I value the person, but the activity itself is hard to force. Overall, today felt busy but meaningful. Good commute, strong gym session, a song that matched the mood, and some clearer thoughts about the kind of person I want to become. Do you ever feel like the world is stacking shit against you all at once at the worst time? Falling in love, rough news, family getting older, people you knew just not acting like themselves? Yeah, me either. Grateful to wonderful co-workers and the usuals at the gym. They keep my day going when life takes a turn. ♥

title: Pill To Swallow
body: Lyn-z got me into Softcult, kinda. I've been listening to "Pill To Swallow" over and over again, currently at 49 scrobbles and rising over the past couple of days. Also listenmaxxing "what u want" by vai5000 because it's insane. This is going to be my most listened to track during Spotify Wrapped, I can promise it. Running on four hours of sleep, a Rockstar Hardcore Green Apple, and a pretty crazy workday with a lot of cool people. Started recording another course with Salim too, who seems like a pretty cool dude. Also decided to start a journal on my website and begin filling it up. Hopefully I can keep it somewhat daily, but I'm also adding a few notable things to the backlog. Not totally sure how far back I'll go yet. Also got three new shirts from Nomad Complex.

title: Vista Mode
body: Worked on the Frutiger Aero/Windows Vista mode a bit more. Added a fake BIOS screen and redid the fake Vista loading screen. I think I got it where I want it to be now. Had my dad over for a Father's Day dinner too. I cooked some chicken and corn and stuff, and we just kind of sat around and talked about life.

title: ChaseRoleplay
body: Lyn-z dragged me into a wacky economy FiveM server. Had a bit of fun, but it's really not my thing. She sounds cute as hell though, and I genuinely enjoyed her and the other players' company during my short stay in ChaseRoleplay.

title: Figure In Phoenix
body: Figured out that one of my favorite dubstep artists, Figure, is playing locally at some shithole parking lot down in Phoenix. Kind of want to go, but I'd be rolling solo. I feel like I need to get out there more.

title: Modern Games
body: Tried to play Forza Horizon 6 with Landon, and I'm just disappointed with modern day games and what they've become, basically.

title: Fake Vista Vibe
body: Changed Frutiger Aero, to be honest. I think I want to go for a fake Windows Vista vibe instead.

title: Frutiger Aero Page
body: Big into Frutiger Aero right now. Kinda want to make a little Frutiger Aero page with little fish and a song by Alyzea.

title: Still Shaved
body: A couple months later, shaving my head might honestly have been one of the best decisions of my life. I feel a lot more confident now, and the burden of needing to worry about hair is just gone. It feels like a weight off my shoulders, basically. It has made life more enjoyable, the gym more enjoyable, swimming more enjoyable, traveling more enjoyable. To sound cringy, it was honestly kind of a pivotal moment in my life.

title: Desert Breeze Furmeet
body: Met up with a distant friend, Gem, at Desert Breeze Park in Tempe. There was a pretty big furmeet and I met a lot of cool people. I'm glad I've gotten more outgoing over the years. His suit was really nice :3

title: Zoo With Family
body: Went to the zoo with family :3 It was a bit underwhelming, honestly. There were a couple of animals, but I didn't get to see the hyenas, which I really wanted to see. I did get to pet a goat though, which was the highlight of my day, because I love goats. Otherwise, yeah, very underwhelming for the price.

title: OdySea After Dark
body: Went to a work event where they booked out the OdySea Aquarium in Scottsdale, and it was a pretty good night. There was a lot of partying and just an overall fun time seeing everything, especially at night when everything was blocked off and felt kind of eerie.

title: Shaved My Head
body: Decided to shave my head. Feels weird, but relieving.

title: New Year Cruise To Globe
body: Went on our annual New Year Cruise to Globe. It was a fun time. I feel a lot of us drifting apart and the squad shrinking as life takes us on more and more back roads without a map.

title: Berge's Riverview Toyota Meet
body: Went down to a massive car meet hosted at Berge's Riverview Toyota. Such a cool turnout and quality time with friends!
